name: Nextbillion.ai
description: Nextbillion.ai — Location intelligence platform with AI-powered maps, routing, and geospatial APIs for logistics.

seo.title: Nextbillion.ai — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Nextbillion.ai: Nextbillion.ai — Location intelligence platform with AI-powered maps, routing, and geospatial APIs for logistics.

when_to_use: Integrating mapping, routing, and navigation APIs into logistics apps
Building fleet management features with customizable map data
Running geospatial AI for last-mile delivery optimization
Replacing Google Maps with a cost-effective mapping platform

pros: Cheaper routing API than Google Maps at scale
Coverage in emerging markets often ignored
Custom map styling and geofencing support
cons: Smaller POI dataset than Google or Mapbox
Requires migration work from established stacks
review.verdict: Credible Google Maps alternative for logistics teams scaling in emerging markets on a tighter budget.
review.best_for: Logistics and delivery startups scaling routing costs in APAC
review.not_for: Consumer apps needing the richest POI and review dataset

lock_in.reason: Maps API, data portable but custom
